branding.name: Legal Eyes
branding.disclaimer: The information on this website is for general purposes only and does not constitute legal advice. Prior results do not guarantee a similar outcome.

hero.headline: Justice Through Insight
hero.subtext: Precision-driven legal solutions for modern challenges. We see what others miss — and we act before others react.

about.title: Clarity in a complex world.
about.description: Legal Eyes is a boutique firm built around a single principle: the sharpest counsel comes from the sharpest perspective. We pair rigorous analysis with discreet, deeply human advocacy for founders, executives, and institutions who can't afford to be misread.
about.pullQuote: We don't simply argue cases. We architect outcomes.
about.vision: To redefine legal counsel as an act of clarity — replacing noise with insight, and reaction with strategy.

founder.name: A. Kohli
founder.note: Twenty years at the bench taught me one thing: every case is a question of perception. Our work begins where assumptions end.

services.title: Corporate Law
services.description: Mergers, governance, venture financing, and cross-border structuring for ambitious businesses.

services.title: Litigation
services.description: Strategic dispute resolution and trial advocacy across commercial, civil, and constitutional matters.

services.title: Intellectual Property
services.description: Trademark, patent, and copyright protection — from filing to enforcement and licensing.

services.title: Compliance & Regulatory
services.description: Risk frameworks, regulatory filings, and audit readiness for regulated industries.

services.title: Legal Advisory
services.description: Ongoing counsel for boards, founders, and family offices navigating high-stakes decisions.

whyUs.title: Why discerning clients choose us.
whyUs.description: Three decades of combined experience, distilled into a quiet, decisive practice.

pillars.title: Data-driven strategy
pillars.description: Every recommendation is backed by precedent analytics and outcome modeling.

pillars.title: Senior-led teams
pillars.description: Partners stay on the file, from intake to verdict.

pillars.title: Discreet & ethical
pillars.description: Confidentiality is the floor, not the ceiling, of how we operate.

pillars.title: Global reach
pillars.description: Trusted correspondents across 14 jurisdictions on four continents.

insights.title: Insights & Case Notes
insights.description: Long-form thinking on law, regulation, and the art of strategic counsel.
